title: Star formation outside galaxies undergoing gravitational and hydrodynamic interactions: dust attenuation and the star formation rate
summary: Galaxies undergo perturbations, either gravitational or hydrodynamic in origin, which can generate extragalactic structures such as rings and tails, where in situ star formation may take place. We selected a sample consisting of JO201 and JW100, undergoing ram-pressure stripping, and NGC 5291 and NGC 7252, formed through gravitational interactions, to investigate how different perturbation mechanisms influence dust content and star formation in extragalactic features. In both cases, star formation can be observed outside the main disks of the galaxies. We present new results of dust attenuation for JO201 and JW100, while for NGC 5291 and NGC 7252 we use results from our previous study, based on high-resolution observations obtained with the Ultraviolet Imaging Telescope onboard AstroSat. Dust attenuation is determined from the ultraviolet continuum slope ($β$) calculated using the FUV-NUV colour, and the star formation rates of the star-forming knots are corrected accordingly. It is seen that dust attenuation and dust-corrected SFR densities of the knots in the ram-pressure stripped tails of JO201 and JW100 are comparable to those in the collisional ring of the NGC 5291 system and the tidal tails of the NGC 7252 system. We conclude that, though the formation scenarios of the tails of JO201 and JW100, the NGC 5291 ring, and the NGC 7252 tails are different, their dust content and star formation activity are notably similar.

AI.tldr: 研究比较了不同扰动机制（冲压剥离和引力相互作用）对星系外结构（环、尾）中尘埃含量和恒星形成的影响，发现尽管形成机制不同，但尘埃衰减和恒星形成活动相似。
AI.motivation: 研究不同扰动机制（冲压剥离与引力相互作用）如何影响星系外结构（如环和尾）中的尘埃含量和恒星形成活动，以理解不同星系相互作用过程对星际介质和恒星形成的影响。
AI.method: 选取JO201和JW100（冲压剥离）以及NGC 5291和NGC 7252（引力相互作用）四个星系样本，使用AstroSat上的紫外成像望远镜进行高分辨率观测，通过FUV-NUV颜色计算紫外连续谱斜率β来确定尘埃衰减，并相应校正恒星形成率。
AI.result: JO201和JW100冲压剥离尾中的尘埃衰减和尘埃校正后的恒星形成率密度与NGC 5291系统的碰撞环和NGC 7252系统的潮汐尾中的相应值相当，表明尽管形成机制不同，但尘埃含量和恒星形成活动相似。
AI.conclusion: 尽管JO201和JW100的尾、NGC 5291的环以及NGC 7252的尾的形成机制不同，但它们的尘埃含量和恒星形成活动显著相似，表明不同扰动机制可能产生相似的星际介质条件和恒星形成环境。

title: Cosmography with $Λ$-Szekeres Models
summary: The cosmological tensions present in the $Λ$ cold dark matter model that have emerged and strengthened over recent years motivate model independent approaches to analysing data. Cosmography is useful for interpreting data in cosmology without imposing assumptions about the field equations of gravity or the matter content in the Universe. Some cosmography methods, denoted covariant cosmography, go even further and stay agnostic to the underlying space-time metric. Due to their high level of generality, covariant cosmography methods can incorporate the anisotropies and inhomogeneities in the observer's vicinity, and may in turn inform about the associated curvature of the relevant structures in our cosmic neighbourhood. Thus, covariant cosmography is a powerful model-independent tool for analysing cosmological data while also enabling the mapping of our local cosmic neighbourhood. In order to be able to explore the covariant cosmography framework to its fullest, it must be tested in tractable models and simulations. In this paper we derive the cosmography of luminosity distance to fourth order in redshift and investigate it in the special case of axially symmetric Szekeres models. We compare the numerical results for the distance-redshift relations of synthetic observers placed within the Szekeres structures with the predictions from the cosmography, and comment on the found level of approximation of the cosmography in relation to other results in the litterature.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了协变宇宙学方法，这是一种不依赖特定时空度规的模型独立数据分析工具，并在轴对称Szekeres模型中测试了红移四阶光度距离的宇宙学关系。
AI.motivation: 近年来ΛCDM模型中出现的宇宙学张力问题促使研究者寻求模型独立的数据分析方法。协变宇宙学方法不仅不依赖引力场方程或宇宙物质成分假设，甚至不依赖底层时空度规，能够处理观测者附近的各向异性和不均匀性，从而映射局部宇宙结构。
AI.method: 推导了红移四阶的光度距离宇宙学关系，并在轴对称Szekeres模型这一特殊情况下进行研究。将Szekeres结构中合成观测者的数值距离-红移关系与宇宙学预测进行比较。
AI.result: 通过比较数值结果与宇宙学预测，评估了宇宙学近似的精度水平，并与文献中的其他结果进行了对比分析。
AI.conclusion: 协变宇宙学是分析宇宙学数据的强大模型独立工具，同时能够映射局部宇宙结构。为了充分发挥该框架的潜力，需要在可处理模型和模拟中进行测试，本文在Szekeres模型中的研究为此提供了重要参考。

title: When Primordial Black Holes Absorb During the Early Universe
summary: We study the evolution of primordial black holes (PBHs) formed in the early universe in the presence of a surrounding thermal bath. By incorporating the effects of thermal absorption, we show that PBHs can undergo significant mass growth, leading to extended lifetimes and substantial deviations from the standard Hawking evaporation scenario. We find a critical collapse efficiency, $γ_{\rm c} \simeq 0.395$, above which the PBH mass grows without bound. This correction has profound implications for both PBH-induced reheating and dark matter (DM) production. Specifically, we find that the reheating temperature can be suppressed, and the DM parameter space for the PBH reheating scenario can undergo $\mathcal{O}(10)$-$\mathcal{O}(10^4)$ corrections, depending on the PBH formation mass and collapse efficiency. Moreover, our results significantly shift the parameter space in which PBHs can account for the entirety of the DM. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first comprehensive phenomenological study to incorporate thermal absorption into PBH evolution and quantify its impact on cosmological observables.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了早期宇宙中形成的原初黑洞在热浴环境下的演化，发现热吸收效应可导致PBH显著质量增长，延长寿命，并偏离标准霍金蒸发理论。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索热吸收效应对原初黑洞演化的影响，这一效应在标准霍金蒸发理论中常被忽略，但对PBH的寿命、质量增长以及相关的宇宙学现象（如再加热和暗物质产生）可能有重要影响。
AI.method: 通过将热吸收效应纳入原初黑洞演化模型，研究团队分析了PBH在热浴环境中的质量变化，计算了临界塌缩效率，并评估了这些效应对再加热温度和暗物质产生参数空间的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现存在临界塌缩效率γ_c≈0.395，超过此值PBH质量将无限制增长。热吸收效应显著改变了PBH演化：再加热温度可能被抑制，暗物质参数空间可产生O(10)-O(10^4)量级的修正，PBH作为全部暗物质候选者的参数空间也发生显著偏移。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个全面考虑热吸收效应并量化其对宇宙学可观测量影响的唯象研究。结果表明热吸收对PBH演化、再加热机制和暗物质产生有深远影响，需要重新评估基于标准霍金蒸发的PBH宇宙学模型。

title: Simulations of multi-phase gas in and around galaxies
comment: Resubmitted to Living Reviews in Computational Astrophysics after addressing the referee reports. Comments welcome
summary: Multiphase gas -- ranging from cold molecular clouds ($\lesssim 100\,$K) to hot, diffuse plasma ($\gtrsim 10^6\,$K) is a defining feature of the interstellar, circumgalactic, intracluster, and intergalactic media. Accurately simulating its dynamics is critical to improving our understanding of galaxy formation and evolution, however, due to their multi-scale and multi-physics nature, multiphase systems are highly challenging to model. In this review, we provide a comprehensive overview of numerical simulations of multiphase gas in and around galaxies. We begin by outlining the environments where multiphase gas arises and the physical and computational challenges associated with its modeling. Key quantities that characterize multiphase gas dynamics are discussed, followed by an in-depth look at idealized setups such as turbulent mixing layers, cloud-wind interactions, thermal instability, and turbulent boxes. The review then transitions to less idealized and/or larger-scale simulations, covering radiative supernovae bubbles, tall box simulations, isolated galaxy models including dwarf and Milky Way-mass systems, and cosmological zoom-in simulations, with a particular focus on simulations that enhance resolution in the halo. Throughout, we emphasize the importance of connecting scales, extracting robust diagnostics, and comparing simulations to observations. We conclude by outlining persistent challenges and promising directions for future work in simulating the multiphase Universe.

AI.tldr: 这篇综述论文全面回顾了星系内外多相气体（从冷分子云到热等离子体）的数值模拟研究，涵盖了从理想化设置到大规模宇宙学模拟的各个层面，强调了跨尺度连接、稳健诊断和观测对比的重要性。
AI.motivation: 多相气体是星际、星系周、星系团内和星系际介质的关键特征，准确模拟其动力学对于理解星系形成和演化至关重要。然而，由于其多尺度和多物理性质，多相系统的建模极具挑战性。
AI.method: 论文采用综述方法，首先概述多相气体出现的环境和建模的物理与计算挑战，然后深入分析理想化设置（如湍流混合层、云-风相互作用、热不稳定性、湍流盒），最后过渡到更接近真实情况的大尺度模拟，包括辐射超新星气泡、高盒模拟、孤立星系模型和宇宙学放大模拟。
AI.result: 论文系统梳理了多相气体模拟的现有研究进展，提供了从微观到宏观的完整模拟框架，强调了分辨率增强技术在晕区模拟中的重要性，并建立了连接不同尺度、提取稳健诊断和与观测对比的方法论。
AI.conclusion: 多相气体模拟领域仍面临持续挑战，但未来研究方向充满希望。论文强调了跨尺度连接、稳健诊断提取和观测对比的重要性，为模拟多相宇宙提供了系统的理论框架和方法指导。

title: One H2 molecule per ten million H-atoms reveals sub-pc scale cold overdensities at z~4
comment: Accepted for publication in Astronomy and Astrophysics
summary: We present the detection and analysis of H2 absorption at z = 4.24 towards the bright quasar J0007-5705, observed with the Very Large Telescope as part of the ESPRESSO QUasar Absorption Line Survey (EQUALS). The high resolving power, R~120000, enables the identification of extremely weak H2 lines in several rotational levels at a total column density of N(H2)~2x10^14 cm^-2, among the lowest ever measured in quasar absorption systems. Remarkably, this constitutes the highest-redshift H2 detection to date. Two velocity components are resolved, separated by only 3 km/s: a narrow (b~1.7 km/s) and a broader (b~6.2 km/s) component. Modelling the rotational population of H2 yields density of log nH/cm^-3 ~ 2.8 with temperature of ~40K (typical of the cold neutral medium) for the narrow component and log nH/cm^-3 ~ 1.4 , T~600K for the warmer, more turbulent component under a moderate ultraviolet (UV) field, suggesting at least several Mpc distance from the quasar. This system reveals the existence of tiny (down to ~0.01 pc), cold overdensities in the neutral medium. Their detection among only 7 damped Lyman-alpha systems in EQUALS suggests that they may be widespread yet usually remain undetected. H2 provides an exceptionally sensitive probe of these structures: even a minute molecular fraction produces measurable Lyman-Werner absorption lines along the extremely narrow optical beam -- the size of the quasar's accretion disc -- when observed at sufficiently high spectral resolution. High-resolution spectroscopy on extremely large telescopes may routinely detect and resolve such structures in the distant Universe, when 21-cm absorption will trace the collective contribution of many cold cloudlets toward larger radio background sources.

AI.tldr: 在z=4.24处首次探测到最高红移的H2吸收系统，揭示宇宙早期存在微小冷密度结构
AI.motivation: 研究早期宇宙中分子氢的分布和性质，探索中性介质中的微小冷密度结构，这些结构通常难以探测但可能普遍存在
AI.method: 使用VLT望远镜的ESPRESSO光谱仪（分辨率R~120000）观测类星体J0007-5705，通过EQUALS巡天项目分析H2吸收线，建立旋转能级模型推导物理参数
AI.result: 探测到总柱密度N(H2)~2×10^14 cm^-2的极弱H2吸收线，是目前最高红移的H2探测；分辨出两个速度分量：窄分量（b~1.7 km/s）对应log nH~2.8、T~40K的冷中性介质，宽分量（b~6.2 km/s）对应log nH~1.4、T~600K的暖湍流介质；系统距离类星体至少数Mpc
AI.conclusion: H2是探测中性介质中微小冷密度结构的极灵敏探针，这些结构可能普遍存在但通常未被探测；未来极高分辨率光谱观测可常规探测此类结构，而21厘米吸收将追踪更大尺度上的冷云团集体贡献

title: Calibrating redshift distributions at $z>2$ with Lyman-$α$ forest cross-correlations
comment: 19 pages, 14 figures. Submitted to MNRAS. Comments are welcome
summary: We explore the feasibility of using Lyman-$α$ (Ly$α$) forests to calibrate the ensemble redshift distribution of the high-redshift tail ($2<z<3$) of photometric galaxies. We use \texttt{CoLoRe} simulations to create mock DESI 5-year Ly$α$ forests and Rubin Observatory LSST 10-year photometric galaxies up to $z=3$, and measure the galaxy redshift distribution via their angular cross-correlations. Due to large redshift-space distortions in the Ly$α$ forest, the conventional $n(z)$ estimator for clustering redshifts does not apply, and we develope a theoretical framework to model the angular cross-correlation directly. Using the simulations, we explore effects of instrumental noise, continuum fitting, and contamination in the Ly$α$ forest, cross-correlation angular scales ($θ$), and redshift bin size ($Δz$) on the signal-to-noise (SNR) of the measurements. We find that continuum fitting methods strongly impact the SNR of the measurements. With our baseline continuum fitting method, \texttt{LyCAN}, at angular scales $θ\sim10$ arcmin and $Δz=0.1$, we measure the cross-correlation signal at $24σ$. If the shape of the redshift distribution and galaxy bias evolution are known well for $z<2$, the cross-correlation can constrain the mean redshift of the galaxy sample to $σ_z/(1+\bar{z}) = 0.006$ at a mean redshift of $\bar{z}=2$. This demonstrates that Ly$α$ cross-correlation is a reliable and promising method to calibrate the high-redshift tails of photometric Stage IV galaxy surveys.

AI.tldr: 利用莱曼α森林与高红移（2<z<3）测光星系交叉相关来校准星系红移分布，通过模拟验证该方法可行性，在特定条件下可获得高信噪比测量。
AI.motivation: 校准第四阶段测光星系巡天的高红移尾部（2<z<3）的红移分布是宇宙学精确测量的关键挑战，传统方法在此红移范围受限，需要开发新校准技术。
AI.method: 使用CoLoRe模拟生成DESI 5年莱曼α森林和LSST 10年测光星系数据，通过角交叉相关测量星系红移分布。由于莱曼α森林存在大尺度红移空间畸变，开发了直接建模角交叉相关的新理论框架。
AI.result: 在角尺度θ∼10角分、Δz=0.1条件下，使用LyCAN连续谱拟合方法可获得24σ的交叉相关信号。若已知z<2的红移分布形状和星系偏差演化，可将红移平均值精度约束到σ_z/(1+ž)=0.006（ž=2时）。
AI.conclusion: 莱曼α森林交叉相关是一种可靠且有前景的方法，可用于校准第四阶段测光星系巡天的高红移尾部红移分布，为宇宙学精确测量提供重要工具。

title: Constraints on the Hot Circumgalactic Medium around Nearby L* Galaxies from SRG/eROSITA All Sky Survey
summary: The circumgalactic medium (CGM) is a multi-phase, dynamic interface between galaxy and the intergalactic medium, providing crucial diagnostics of galaxy evolution. However, direct evidence for a hot (million-Kelvin) CGM around present-day L* galaxies remains elusive. Here, we present the first systematic search of the hot CGM around nearby (< 50 Mpc) L* galaxies, by stacking their X-ray images and spectra from the SRG/eROSITA all-sky survey. Significant diffuse X-ray emission is detected out to ~ 50 kpc, with spectral signatures consistent with a hot gas but arguing against a predominantly non-thermal origin. The radial distribution and total amount of the hot gas are in agreement with prediction by IllustrisTNG simulations. The constraints on the hot CGM derived in this study hold promise for calibrating key physical processes in next-generation cosmological simulations.

AI.tldr: 首次通过SRG/eROSITA全天巡天数据堆叠分析，在近邻L*星系周围50kpc范围内探测到显著的热CGM弥散X射线辐射，光谱特征支持热气体起源而非非热主导，与IllustrisTNG模拟预测一致。
AI.motivation: 星系际介质（CGM）作为星系与星系际介质之间的多相动态界面，对星系演化至关重要，但迄今为止缺乏对现今L*星系周围百万开尔文热CGM的直接观测证据。
AI.method: 利用SRG/eROSITA全天巡天数据，对距离小于50Mpc的近邻L*星系的X射线图像和光谱进行堆叠分析，以增强信噪比探测微弱的热CGM信号。
AI.result: 在约50kpc范围内探测到显著的弥散X射线辐射，光谱特征与热气体一致且排除了非热起源主导的可能性，热气体的径向分布和总质量与IllustrisTNG模拟预测相符。
AI.conclusion: 首次系统性地探测到近邻L*星系周围的热CGM，为校准下一代宇宙学模拟中的关键物理过程提供了重要观测约束。

title: Unveiling a Thin Filament of the Cosmic Web in the Ursa Major Supergroup
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures. Accepted for publication in MNRAS Letters
summary: Filaments are crucial components of the cosmic web, representing the extensive and aligned distributions of galaxies and gas. Using the Five-hundred-meter Aperture Spherical radio Telescope (FAST), we report the detection of a filament in the Ursa Major supergroup using atomic-hydrogen (HI) observations. This filament consists of sixteen various types of galaxies and five starless gas clumps, spanning a length of approximately 0.9 Mpc. Notably, it is extremely thin, with a thickness comparable to the diameter of a galaxy. We observed a galaxy-filament spin alignment and a velocity gradient within the filament. These findings strongly suggest a cold accretion flow along the filament, potentially contributing to the formation and growth of the galaxies. The thin filament, as a small group, is likely to be merged into the Ursa Major supergroup in the context of hierarchical structure formation.

AI.tldr: FAST望远镜在Ursa Major超星系团中探测到一个由16个星系和5个无星气体团组成的超薄HI纤维结构，长度约0.9 Mpc，厚度仅相当于星系直径，观测到星系-纤维自旋对齐和速度梯度，表明存在冷吸积流。
AI.motivation: 研究宇宙网中纤维结构在星系形成和演化中的作用，特别是通过HI观测探测星系间气体分布和动力学特征，理解冷吸积流在星系生长中的贡献。
AI.method: 使用500米口径球面射电望远镜（FAST）对Ursa Major超星系团进行原子氢（HI）观测，探测星系间气体分布，分析纤维结构的几何形态、动力学特征和星系排列模式。
AI.result: 探测到一个长度约0.9 Mpc的超薄纤维结构，包含16个不同类型星系和5个无星气体团，厚度仅相当于星系直径；观测到星系自旋与纤维方向对齐，以及纤维内部的速度梯度。
AI.conclusion: 观测结果强烈支持冷吸积流沿纤维结构存在的假设，这种吸积流可能促进星系形成和生长；该薄纤维作为一个小型结构，可能在等级结构形成背景下并入Ursa Major超星系团。

title: The detectability of bars at high redshift: a case study using Euclid-like mock observations of TNG50 simulated galaxies
comment: 12 pages, 8 figures, revised version submitted to MNRAS
summary: Modern surveys such as Euclid report a decline in the fraction of barred galaxies from the local Universe to $z \sim 1$, whereas the TNG50 simulation predicts higher bar fractions, in tension with observations. This discrepancy may be due to observational biases in bar detectability when comparing simulations with observations. We present a proof-of-concept study quantifying how Euclid-like observational conditions affect bar detectability in TNG50. We analysed the entire galaxy sample at $z = 0.5$ and highlight one borderline case with a bar length of 2.1 kpc and bar strength $A_2 = 0.4$. Synthetic images were produced with Monte Carlo radiative transfer and realistic post-processing, and analysed with ellipse fitting and Fourier decomposition, as well as the recently constructed Zoobot analysis. Results were compared to idealised, noise-free stellar mass maps. In the illustrative case the bar is clearly detected in the mass map and remains visible in the Euclid VIS $I_{\rm E}$ filter, where Zoobot also classifies it as barred, but becomes undetectable in $Y_{\rm E}$ and in the VIS-NISP RGB composite, with all methods failing outside VIS. Extending to the full $z = 0.5$ sample, Zoobot recovers only 31/141 galaxies, while $A_2$ and ellipse fitting perform better (80/141 and 67/141) but still miss many short or weak bars. When non-detections are counted as unbarred, the bar fraction of 44 percent falls to $12\!-\!33$ percent depending on the method. These results demonstrate the strong impact of observational effects on bar detectability and motivate bar-fraction estimates which incorporate realistic instrumental conditions across redshift in cosmological simulations.

AI.tldr: 研究通过模拟欧几里得望远镜观测条件，发现观测偏差显著影响棒旋星系的检测率，解释了模拟与观测间棒旋星系比例差异的原因。
AI.motivation: 欧几里得等现代巡天观测显示棒旋星系比例从本地宇宙到z~1有所下降，而TNG50模拟预测的棒旋星系比例更高，与观测存在矛盾。这种差异可能源于比较模拟与观测时棒旋星系可检测性的观测偏差。
AI.method: 研究分析了TNG50模拟中z=0.5的整个星系样本，通过蒙特卡洛辐射传输和真实后处理生成合成图像，使用椭圆拟合、傅里叶分解以及Zoobot分析等方法，并与理想无噪声恒星质量图进行比较。
AI.result: 在典型案例中，棒旋星系在质量图中清晰可见，在欧几里得VIS IE滤波器中仍可检测，但在YE滤波器和VIS-NISP RGB合成图像中变得不可检测。在整个z=0.5样本中，Zoobot仅恢复31/141个星系，A2和椭圆拟合表现更好（80/141和67/141），但仍遗漏许多短或弱的棒旋星系。当未检测到的星系被计为无棒时，棒旋星系比例从44%下降到12-33%。
AI.conclusion: 观测效应对棒旋星系可检测性有强烈影响，需要在宇宙学模拟中结合真实仪器条件来估计棒旋星系比例，以解释模拟与观测间的差异。

title: UNCOVER/MegaScience Finds Uniform and Highly Bursty Star Formation at 3 < z < 9, consistent with the High-Redshift UV Luminosity Function
summary: Star formation timescales are key to understanding fundamental physics like feedback mechanisms, as well as the abundance of bright galaxies at $z>10$. We investigate galaxy star formation histories (SFHs) and their evolution across $z\sim3$--9 by measuring the line-to-UV ratio (\rline) and line equivalent width (EW) of \hanii\ and \oiiihb\ directly from UNCOVER/MegaScience spectro-photometry without relying on a specific SFH or nebular line modeling. Our photometric measurements recover \rline\ and EW to $<10\%$ systematic accuracy compared to spectroscopy. This allows us to construct a large mass- (and flux-) complete sample and quantitatively examine how \rline\ evolves with redshift and stellar mass. We find that the intrinsic scatter in \rline\ does not significantly evolve with redshift across $3<z<7$, though it may increase at $z\gtrsim8$. We build population-level toy models using \texttt{fsps} to help interpret our observations, and find that scatter in \rline\ primarily reflects the amplitude of SFH fluctuations; this implies that our observed lack of evolution in the scatter of \rline\ is due to similar star formation burstiness from $z\sim3$ to $z\sim7$. Our observations are best reproduced by a set of SFHs with rising, long-duration, and large-amplitude bursts. Finally, we demonstrate that the toy model that best describes our $z\sim6$ data can boost UV brightness by up to $ΔM_{\rm UV}\sim-2.0\,{\rm mag}$ compared with a 200\,Myr constant SFH, and naturally produces a large number of galaxies at $z>10$. This suggests that no significant evolution in star formation burstiness is required to explain the abundance of UV-bright galaxies at high redshift.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过测量星系谱线-紫外辐射比(r_line)和等效宽度，分析z~3-9星系的恒星形成历史，发现恒星形成爆发性在z~3-7期间没有显著演化，这有助于解释高红移明亮星系的丰度。
AI.motivation: 研究恒星形成时标对于理解反馈机制等基础物理以及z>10明亮星系的丰度至关重要。通过分析星系恒星形成历史及其演化，可以深入了解高红移星系的形成过程。
AI.method: 使用UNCOVER/MegaScience光谱测光数据直接测量Hα和[OIII]的谱线-紫外辐射比(r_line)和等效宽度，不依赖特定的恒星形成历史或星云线模型。构建大质量完整样本，建立群体级玩具模型(使用fsps)来解释观测结果。
AI.result: 谱线-紫外辐射比(r_line)的内在散射在3<z<7期间没有显著演化，但在z≳8可能增加。观测到的r_line散射主要反映恒星形成历史波动的幅度，表明恒星形成爆发性在z~3到z~7期间相似。最佳拟合模型显示上升、长持续时间、大幅度的爆发性恒星形成历史，可使紫外亮度提升ΔM_UV~-2.0星等。
AI.conclusion: 恒星形成爆发性在z~3-7期间没有显著演化，这可以解释高红移紫外明亮星系的丰度，无需假设恒星形成爆发性的显著演化。观测结果支持上升、长持续时间、大幅度的恒星形成爆发模式。

title: A first GLIMPSE into star clusters populations across cosmic time
comment: 17 pages, 8 figures, comments welcome, submitted to A&A
summary: We present the first sample of 222 high-redshift (z>0.5) star clusters, detected with JWST/NIRCam in 78 magnified galaxies from different galaxy cluster fields. The majority of the systems (~60%) is observed in the very deep NIRCam observations of the cluster AbellS1063 (GLIMPSE program), showing the power that deep observations, combined with lensing, has to reveal these primordial stellar structures. We perform simultaneous size-flux estimates in all available NIRCam filters and spectral energy distribution (SED) fitting analysis to recover star cluster physical properties. All star cluster candidates have very high magnification. Star clusters and clumps show similar ages and redshift distributions, although noticeable differences are seen in their masses, sizes and stellar surface densities inherent to the lack of resolution in the latter group. We reconstruct the formation redshift of star clusters and find that the large majority of the observed star clusters show young ages (<100 Myr) and seems to form at cosmic noon (CN,1<z<4). A small sample of CN star clusters is about 1 Gyr old, these potential globular clusters have formed well within cosmic reionization. Star clusters have stellar densities in the range 10^2 to 10^6 M/pc^2, with median values around 10^4 pc2. Their sizes and densities better overlap with those of nuclear star clusters in the local Universe. These intrinsic properties make high-z star clusters a viable channel to grow intermediate mass black holes. We use Bayesian inference to make first direct measurement of the star cluster mass function at z>1, based on a subsample of 60 star clusters younger than 100 Myr and with masses above 2e6 Msun. The star cluster mass function is well described by a power-law with slope beta = -1.89 suggesting that a power-law -2 function might already be in place in the distant Universe.

AI.tldr: JWST/NIRCam观测发现222个高红移(z>0.5)星团，主要位于AbellS1063星系团场中，通过引力透镜放大揭示这些原始恒星结构。研究分析了星团物理性质、质量函数，发现大多数星团年龄年轻(<100 Myr)，形成于宇宙正午时期。
AI.motivation: 利用JWST/NIRCam的深度观测和引力透镜放大效应，首次系统性地探测和研究高红移(z>0.5)星团，了解早期宇宙中恒星结构的形成和演化。
AI.method: 使用JWST/NIRCam在78个放大星系中探测星团；进行同步尺寸-流量估计和SED拟合分析恢复物理性质；使用贝叶斯推断测量星团质量函数。
AI.result: 发现222个高红移星团，大多数年龄年轻(<100 Myr)，形成于宇宙正午(1<z<4)；星团质量函数符合幂律分布，斜率β=-1.89；星团尺寸和密度与本地宇宙核星团相似。
AI.conclusion: 高红移星团是研究早期宇宙恒星形成的重要探针，其性质表明它们可能是中等质量黑洞形成的可行通道，且幂律质量函数在遥远宇宙中可能已经建立。

title: Forecast on the generalised dark matter properties from a Euclid-like survey
summary: The Stage~IV \textit{Euclid} mission will deliver spectroscopic galaxy redshifts together with photometric positions and shapes, enabling cosmological analyses through spectroscopic galaxy clustering (GCsp), photometric galaxy clustering (GCph), weak-lensing cosmic shear (WL), and their cross-correlation (XC). In this work we forecast the constraining power of a Euclid-like survey on the Generalised Dark Matter (GDM) parameters \(w_{\rm gdm}\) and \(c^{2}_{s,{\rm gdm}}\). Our analysis extends previous forecasting pipeline used for standard cold dark matter. For GCsp, we adopt a semi-analytic nonlinear RSD model, with free terms for each bin. For the photometric probes, we compute the nonlinear GDM matter power spectrum using dedicated simulations, and we modify the lensing and clustering window and the intrinsic-alignment prescription. We consider several survey configurations and explore three fiducial values of \(σ_8\) motivated by current CMB and low-redshift measurements. In an optimistic setting, for fiducial values \(σ_8 \simeq 0.81\) and \(σ_8 \simeq 0.77\), we find relative errors of \(4.01\%\) (GCsp), \(5.01\%\) (GCph+WL+XC), and \(1.96\%\) (all probes) on \(c^{2}_{s,{\rm gdm}}\), and \(3.26\%\) (GCph+WL+XC) and \(1.85\%\) (all probes) on \(w_{\rm gdm}\). For a lower fiducial value \(σ_8 \simeq 0.67\), that could strongly disfavor $Λ$GDM, we find constraints of \(5\%\) (GCsp), \(5\%\) (GCph+WL+XC), and \(2.45\%\) (all probes) on \(c^{2}_{s,{\rm gdm}}\), and \(3.43\%\) (GCph+WL+XC) and \(2.04\%\) (all probes) on \(w_{\rm gdm}\). We also found that, combining all probes, whether in the pessimistic or optimistic settings, a Euclid-like survey will be able to disentangle between the three scenarios. These results show that the survey will be able to constrain the GDM parameters and distinguish between normalisations of the matter fluctuations.(Abridged)

AI.tldr: 使用Euclid-like巡天数据预测广义暗物质参数约束能力，分析不同σ₈基准值下的精度
AI.motivation: Euclid任务将提供光谱和光度学数据，需要评估其对广义暗物质(GDM)参数w_gdm和c²_s,gdm的约束能力，以区分不同的宇宙学场景
AI.method: 扩展标准冷暗物质预测流程：对GCsp采用半解析非线性RSD模型；对光度学探针使用专用模拟计算非线性GDM物质功率谱，修改透镜和聚类窗口及内禀对准模型
AI.result: 乐观情况下(σ₈≈0.81/0.77)：c²_s,gdm相对误差为4.01%(GCsp)、5.01%(GCph+WL+XC)、1.96%(所有探针)；w_gdm为3.26%(GCph+WL+XC)、1.85%(所有探针)。低σ₈≈0.67时约束略弱但仍能区分三种场景
AI.conclusion: Euclid-like巡天能够有效约束广义暗物质参数，并区分不同的物质涨落归一化场景，为理解暗物质性质提供重要观测约束

title: Improving constraints on primordial non-Gaussianity from Quaia with a new cosmological observable: angular redshift fluctuations
comment: 13 pages, 8 figures, version submitted to A&A
summary: Angular redshift fluctuations (ARF) are a new cosmological observable, recently proposed in the literature. It measures the 2D angular deviations of the average redshift of a given matter tracer under an input redshift shell. Since it depends on the galaxy bias, it can be used to constrain primordial non-Gaussianity through the scale-dependent bias effect. We analyze a sample of quasars built upon the Gaia satellite and unWISE data, Quaia, to measure the local non-Gaussianity parameter $f_{\rm NL}$. This sample is particularly suitable for measuring $f_{\rm NL}$ due to its large volume coverage. We measure the ARF power spectra from the Quaia catalog and combine their information with the 2D (projected) galaxy density and their cross-correlation with the $Planck$ PR4 CMB lensing maps lensing to jointly constrain $f_{\rm NL}$. Assuming the universality relation, we measure $f_{\rm NL} = -3 \pm 14$ at 68% confidence level by combining Quaia quasar angular density and ARF with the CMB lensing. This result is the second tightest constraint on $f_{\rm NL}$ using LSS two-point statistics to date and the best measurement achieved using two-point projected summary statistics, improving by $\sim$25% the previous measurement from Quaia. Our results motivate the inclusion of ARF as an additional cosmological observable in future 2D analysis of upcoming datasets from large surveys.

AI.tldr: 利用Quaia类星体样本，通过角向红移涨落(ARF)这一新观测量和2D星系密度分布，结合CMB透镜效应，对原初非高斯性参数f_NL给出了目前最严格的二维投影统计约束：f_NL = -3 ± 14。
AI.motivation: 角向红移涨落(ARF)是一种新的宇宙学观测量，可用于通过尺度依赖的偏置效应约束原初非高斯性。Quaia类星体样本因其大体积覆盖特别适合测量f_NL参数。
AI.method: 使用基于Gaia卫星和unWISE数据的Quaia类星体样本，测量ARF功率谱，并结合2D星系密度分布及其与Planck PR4 CMB透镜图的交叉相关，联合约束f_NL参数。
AI.result: 在普适性关系假设下，结合Quaia类星体角密度、ARF和CMB透镜效应，测得f_NL = -3 ± 14（68%置信水平）。这是目前利用大尺度结构两点统计给出的第二严格约束，也是二维投影统计的最佳测量结果，比先前Quaia测量改进了约25%。
AI.conclusion: ARF应作为额外的宇宙学观测量纳入未来大型巡天数据集的二维分析中，以进一步提高原初非高斯性参数的约束精度。

title: Relaxing DESI DR2 BAO Constraints on $\sum m_ν$ with Planck and SPT-3G 2018 in the Context of SPT D1
summary: We present constraints on the sum of neutrino masses $\sum m_ν$ from a dataset incorporating the full SPT-3G 2018 TT/TE/EE+lensing spectra together with Planck PR4 lensing and low-$\ell$ parts of the Planck PR3 spectra. Using it as a baseline for the DESI DR2 BAO measurements, we arrive at a $95\%$ upper limit of $\sum m_ν< 0.11$ eV, relaxing the tension between $\rm Λ$CDM and lower bounds on $\sum m_ν$ based on neutrino oscillation experiments. When including DES Y1 weak lensing information and the Pantheon+ SNIa catalog, the limit is further loosened to $\sum m_ν<0.138$ eV with a slight preference for $\sum m_ν>0$. On contrast, replacing SPT-3G 2018 primary CMB and lensing spectra with ones from the SPT-3G 2019-2020 (D1) release tightens the overall constraint to $<0.082$ eV and pushes the $\sum m_ν$ posterior mode value to zero, indicating a preference for quasi-negative neutrino masses in line with the D1 analysis. This is a curious shift within SPT-3G measurements of the same field taken in 2018 and in 2019-2020 and processed with different analysis pipelines.

AI.tldr: 该研究结合SPT-3G宇宙微波背景辐射数据、DESI重子声学振荡测量、弱引力透镜和超新星数据，对中微子质量总和∑mν设置了新的限制，发现不同年份的SPT-3G数据给出了相互矛盾的结果。
AI.motivation: 研究中微子质量总和对于理解宇宙学模型和粒子物理至关重要。当前ΛCDM模型与中微子振荡实验给出的中微子质量下限之间存在张力，需要通过更精确的宇宙学观测来约束中微子质量总和。
AI.method: 结合多种宇宙学数据集：SPT-3G 2018年的TT/TE/EE谱和透镜效应数据、Planck PR4透镜数据、Planck PR3低ℓ谱、DESI DR2重子声学振荡测量、DES Y1弱引力透镜数据和Pantheon+超新星目录。使用不同年份的SPT-3G数据（2018年和2019-2020年D1版本）进行对比分析。
AI.result: 使用SPT-3G 2018数据结合DESI BAO测量，得到∑mν<0.11 eV（95%置信水平）。加入弱引力透镜和超新星数据后，限制放宽到∑mν<0.138 eV，且略微偏好∑mν>0。但使用SPT-3G 2019-2020数据时，限制收紧到∑mν<0.082 eV，且后验分布峰值移向零，甚至出现准负中微子质量的偏好。
AI.conclusion: 不同年份的SPT-3G测量给出了相互矛盾的中微子质量约束，2018年数据倾向于非零中微子质量，而2019-2020年数据则偏好零质量。这种差异可能源于不同的数据处理流程，需要进一步研究以理解这种测量不一致性。

title: Improved measurements of the age of JWST galaxies at z=6-10
comment: 14 pages, 8 figures, accepted to be published in MNRAS
summary: From James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) surveys, 31 galaxies with average redshift 7.3 are selected containing large Balmer break, Lyman-$α$ break (V-shaped SED versus $λ$). Apart from Hubble Space Telescope (HST) and JWST-NIRCam (Near-infrared camera) photometry for these galaxies, there are JWST-NIRSpec (Near-infrared spectrograph) spectra for 13 galaxies and mid-infrared photometry (mostly JWST-MIRI) for 15 of them. Spectroscopical analyses included Balmer emission lines, Balmer + 4000 angstroms breaks or CaII lines. Spectral energy distribution (SED) fitting with photometry include old and young stellar populations, emission lines associated to HII regions, AGN, interstellar dust extinction and intergalactic extinction from neutral hydrogen. By adopting realistic extinction curves and taking into account the V-shaped SED and low emission at near infrared at rest, the analyses show that AGN contribution in these galaxies ('little red dots' most of them) should be small on average in the reddest wavelengths, though important for few of the 31 galaxies. Average age of the 31 galaxies: $0.61\pm 0.31$(95% CL) Gyr, while the average age of the $Λ$CDM universe is 0.70 Gyr. This corresponds to a formation epoch $z_{ form.}>11.2$(97.5% CL). Reddest galaxies present largest ages. One of these very red galaxies gets an age incompatible to be younger than the age of the Universe within $>4.7σ$. TP-AGB effect cannot explain this tension. None the less, there may be other uncertainties in the models, so this tension is a provisional result and further research is needed to confirm it.

AI.tldr: JWST观测31个高红移星系（平均z=7.3），通过SED拟合发现这些星系年龄平均0.61±0.31 Gyr，形成于z>11.2，最红的星系年龄最大，其中一个星系年龄与宇宙年龄存在>4.7σ的不一致。
AI.motivation: 利用JWST观测数据研究高红移星系的恒星形成历史，特别是通过Balmer断点、Lyman-α断点等特征分析星系年龄，探索早期宇宙中星系的形成时间。
AI.method: 结合HST、JWST-NIRCam、JWST-NIRSpec和MIRI多波段观测数据，使用光谱能量分布（SED）拟合方法，考虑年老和年轻恒星群体、HII区发射线、AGN贡献、星际尘埃消光和中性氢的星系际消光，采用实际消光曲线进行分析。
AI.result: 31个星系平均年龄0.61±0.31 Gyr（95%置信水平），形成红移z>11.2（97.5%置信水平）。最红的星系年龄最大。AGN贡献在红端波长平均较小，但对少数星系重要。其中一个非常红的星系年龄与宇宙年龄存在>4.7σ的不一致，TP-AGB效应无法解释这一矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 高红移星系在宇宙早期（z>11.2）已形成，最红的星系年龄最大。观测到一个星系年龄与宇宙年龄存在显著不一致，这可能是模型不确定性所致，需要进一步研究确认。

title: XMM-Newton observations of ten high-redshift CAMIRA clusters of galaxies
summary: We present results from XMM-Newton observations of ten high-redshift ($0.81 < z < 1.17$) galaxy clusters selected from the CAMIRA catalog based on high richness ($N > 40$). These massive clusters, identified in the Hyper Suprime-Cam Subaru Strategic Program field, provide an ideal sample for probing the dynamical state of the intracluster medium (ICM) in the early Universe. We performed uniform X-ray imaging and spectral analyses to measure the ICM temperature and bolometric luminosity, and investigated cluster morphology through offsets between the brightest cluster galaxy (BCG) and the X-ray peak. Extended X-ray emission was detected from all targets, but only one system was classified as dynamically relaxed, indicating a low relaxed fraction ($\sim 10\%$) at high redshift. By combining this high-$z$ sample with a lower-redshift CAMIRA cluster sample, we derived scaling relations among richness, temperature, luminosity, and mass. The results are broadly consistent with predictions from both the self-similar model and the baseline model incorporating the mass--concentration relation. We find no significant redshift evolution, strengthening the view that cluster scaling relations are largely established by $z \sim 1$. We also examined the AGN fraction among member galaxies and found significantly higher AGN activity in high-redshift clusters, particularly in the outskirts, suggesting enhanced AGN triggering during early cluster assembly and a possible connection to the thermodynamic state of dynamically young clusters. These findings provide new insights into the formation and evolution of massive clusters and the thermodynamic history of the ICM, and complement large-area X-ray surveys such as eROSITA.

AI.tldr: XMM-Newton观测10个高红移富星系团，发现只有10%处于动力学弛豫状态，标度关系在z~1时已基本确立，高红移星系团AGN活动显著增强。
AI.motivation: 研究早期宇宙中大质量星系团内介质（ICM）的动力学状态，探索星系团标度关系的红移演化，以及高红移星系团中AGN活动特征。
AI.method: 使用XMM-Newton对10个高红移（0.81<z<1.17）CAMIRA星系团进行均匀X射线成像和光谱分析，测量ICM温度和光度，通过BCG与X射线峰值偏移研究形态，并与低红移样本比较标度关系。
AI.result: 所有目标均检测到延展X射线辐射，但仅10%被分类为动力学弛豫；标度关系与自相似模型和包含质量-浓度关系的基线模型一致，无显著红移演化；高红移星系团AGN比例显著更高，特别是在外围区域。
AI.conclusion: 星系团标度关系在z~1时已基本确立，高红移星系团中低弛豫比例和高AGN活动表明早期星系团组装过程中的动力学年轻状态和增强的AGN触发机制。

adjustments.label: cluster gas rather than high-z galaxy gas
